name: Pork Chop Lima Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the pork chops with salt and pepper.
2. Brown the pork chops in oil with the chopped onion until golden brown.
3. Layer the green pepper, drained Lima beans, and seasoned pork chops in an oven-proof casserole dish.
4. Mix hot water, tomato catsup, and seasonings to taste in a separate bowl.
5. Pour the mixture over the layered casserole.
6. Add additional bean liquid if needed to cover the layers.
7. Place the dish in an oven preheated to 350°F (175°C) and bake for 1 hour and 30 minutes.
8. Serve hot and enjoy!
